app_info.subtitle: Manage social posts
app_info.description: Upload-Post helps users publish, schedule, analyze, and manage social media posts from ChatGPT. It supports video, photo, text, and document publishing; scheduling and queue management; analytics; profile management; Instagram comments and DMs; browser-based media staging; and FFmpeg media processing across connected social platforms.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves aggregated analytics for a profile without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only returns existing analytics data and does not post to social platforms or external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves impression totals and optional metric breakdowns without changing account data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads stored metrics and does not affect public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel any content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves metrics for an existing post request without modifying the post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads analytics data and does not write to connected platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or publish anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns reference information about available metrics without changing any user data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not interact with public platforms or external write endpoints.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists comments for an Instagram post without replying or changing the post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads comments and does not create public replies or messages.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Sends a private DM reply to an Instagram commenter, which changes conversation state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Sends a message through a connected external social platform.
justifications.destructive_justification: The sent message is user-visible and cannot be reliably undone after delivery.

justifications.read_only_justification: Posts a public reply under an Instagram comment, changing platform state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates visible content on a connected social platform.
justifications.destructive_justification: The public reply is externally visible and may not be reversible through this tool.

justifications.read_only_justification: Sends a direct message to a recipient, which changes external conversation state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Transmits a message through a connected social platform.
justifications.destructive_justification: The delivered DM is user-visible and cannot be reliably undone after sending.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists recent DM conversations without sending, editing, or deleting messages.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads conversation metadata and does not write to external platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can start, pause, resume, stop, or delete AutoDM monitors, which changes automation state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Controls automations that can send messages on connected social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can stop or delete active DM automations and can enable irreversible outgoing messages.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private media processing job and consumes processing resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Processes media in Upload-Post infrastructure without publishing to public platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite source media and only creates a derived processing job.

justifications.read_only_justification: Polls an existing FFmpeg job status without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private processing status and does not publish or message externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns a download URL for an existing processing result without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only retrieves private result metadata and does not create public platform content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, or publish anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads monthly FFmpeg usage and quota information without changing resources.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only returns private account usage and does not affect external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a temporary staging upload record and signed R2 upload URL.
justifications.open_world_justification: Allocates temporary media staging in external storage for later publishing.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete existing media or publish content; it only creates a temporary upload target.

justifications.read_only_justification: Validates a staged upload and marks the temporary media object as uploaded.
justifications.open_world_justification: Completes temporary external storage state so the media can be passed to publishing tools.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite existing media and does not publish by itself.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads status for an existing temporary media upload without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only retrieves private staging metadata and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes a temporary staged media object and updates its staging status.
justifications.open_world_justification: Deletes an object from external storage used for browser media staging.
justifications.destructive_justification: Removes the staged upload object before its automatic expiration.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists connected Facebook pages without changing account or page settings.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads available page metadata and does not post to Facebook.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists connected LinkedIn pages without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads page metadata and does not publish to LinkedIn.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists Pinterest boards available to a profile without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads board metadata and does not create Pins.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists Google Business locations available for posting without changing selection.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads location metadata and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates which Google Business location a profile will use for future posts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes posting configuration for a connected external Google Business account.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite posted content and only changes an active location setting.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves metadata for recent Reddit posts without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads existing Reddit post details and does not post or reply.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves queue configuration without changing any settings.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private scheduling configuration and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces the posting queue configuration for a profile.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes scheduling behavior that controls future public posts.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the previous queue configuration with the supplied settings.

justifications.read_only_justification: Previews upcoming queue slots without adding or changing queued posts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads scheduling projections and does not affect external platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists currently scheduled posts without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private scheduled-post data and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Cancels a scheduled post, changing the user's posting plan.
justifications.open_world_justification: Prevents a planned public social post from being published.
justifications.destructive_justification: Removes a scheduled publishing job before it runs.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes the date or timezone of a scheduled post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Alters when content will be published to an external platform.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the existing schedule for a queued publishing job.

justifications.read_only_justification: Checks an async upload status by request ID without changing the upload.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private job status and does not publish or message externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Checks a scheduled or queued job status without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private job status and does not affect external platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves paginated upload history without changing any records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads account history and does not publish or message externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves recent media from connected accounts without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads media metadata and does not publish, reply, or send messages.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Uploads, schedules, or queues a video post, changing Upload-Post and platform state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish or schedule video content on connected social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or queues content but does not delete or overwrite existing posts.

justifications.read_only_justification: Uploads, schedules, or queues photo posts, changing Upload-Post and platform state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish or schedule image content on connected social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or queues content but does not delete or overwrite existing posts.

justifications.read_only_justification: Uploads, schedules, or queues a text post, changing Upload-Post and platform state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish or schedule text content on connected social platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or queues content but does not delete or overwrite existing posts.

justifications.read_only_justification: Uploads, schedules, or queues a LinkedIn document post.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish or schedule document content on LinkedIn.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or queues content but does not delete or overwrite existing posts.

justifications.read_only_justification: Opens a browser UI with prefilled values and does not publish until the user acts in the widget.
justifications.open_world_justification: The launcher itself does not write to external systems; publishing happens through separate widget-triggered tools.
justifications.destructive_justification: Opening the UI does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Validates credentials and returns account information without changing account state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private account metadata and does not interact with public platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists Upload-Post profiles without creating, updating, or deleting them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private profile metadata and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new private Upload-Post profile in the user's account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates internal profile state and does not publish to public platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a profile and does not delete or overwrite existing profiles.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes an Upload-Post profile and disconnects its social accounts.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes private Upload-Post account state without publishing public content.
justifications.destructive_justification: Permanently removes a profile and its connected social-account links.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a JWT and connection URL for an embedded social-account connection flow.
justifications.open_world_justification: Generates private connection credentials and does not publish to external platforms.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Validates an existing JWT and returns its status without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads token validity and does not publish or message externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, send, publish, or cancel anything.

test_cases.description: Publish a provided video URL to Instagram Reels with an optimized caption.
test_cases.user_prompt: Publish this video URL to Instagram Reels using profile marketing and write a concise caption for launch week.
test_cases.expected_output: Queues or starts an async Instagram video upload and returns a request ID or job status summary.

test_cases.description: Open the browser upload flow for an attached video file.
test_cases.user_prompt: Upload the attached video to Instagram, generate a caption, and use the profile automated-tests.
test_cases.expected_output: Opens the Upload Studio with profile, platform, format, and caption prefilled so the user can select the file and publish asynchronously.

test_cases.description: Schedule a text post on LinkedIn for a future time.
test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a LinkedIn text post for next Monday at 10:00 Europe/Madrid using profile founders with copy about our product launch.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a scheduled LinkedIn text post and returns scheduling status or a job identifier.

test_cases.description: Inspect account profiles and connected pages before posting.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my Upload-Post profiles and list the LinkedIn company pages available for the marketing profile.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns available profiles and LinkedIn pages so the user can choose the correct posting target.

test_cases.description: Review analytics for a profile and a specific post.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show analytics for profile marketing over the last month and then get the metrics for request abc123.
test_cases.expected_output: Summarizes profile performance and the specific post metrics without modifying posts.

test_cases.description: Reply to an Instagram comment by DM after reading comments.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find comments on this Instagram post and privately send the guide link to the commenter with comment ID 179999.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists relevant comments and sends the requested private reply only after the user identifies the target comment.

test_cases.description: Create a short media-processing job and retrieve the result.
test_cases.user_prompt: Trim this public video URL from second 3 to 47, generate a processed file, and give me the download URL when ready.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a private FFmpeg job, polls until complete, and returns the processed media download details.

test_cases.description: Preview and update queue settings for a profile.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show the next available queue slot for profile marketing, then update its posting queue to weekdays at 10:00 and 16:00.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows upcoming queue availability and, after confirmation, updates the profile queue configuration.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Move my 3pm calendar meeting to tomorrow and invite the sales team.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not manage calendars or meeting invitations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for paid advertising or campaign spend.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Boost my latest Instagram post with a $500 ad budget and target founders in Spain.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should explain that paid ad buying and budget management are outside its supported posting workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for credential recovery or secret extraction.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find and show me the API keys or passwords for my connected Instagram account.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not retrieve or expose secrets and should direct the user to official account-management flows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unsupported inbox access outside social DM tools.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Read my Gmail inbox and reply to the latest customer email.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not access Gmail or email inboxes.
